title: Phase C: Schema forward-compat (add tags field + event type v2 rename + docs/schema.md)
description: Last-cheap-window schema additions for rc.3 review skill compat, single commit. (1) **Add 1 frontmatter field**: `tags: [tag1, tag2]` (flat flow-style array, parser already supports). init-scan should auto-fill from forensic tech stack keywords. Required for rc.3 review skill's tag-filter search. NOT add: last_review_at, source_session, confidence_score, review_count, parent_id — events.jsonl is single source of truth (avoid double-write consistency issues). (2) **Event type rename for v2 vocabulary**: rule_context_planned→knowledge_context_planned; rule_selection→knowledge_selection; rule_sections_fetched→knowledge_sections_fetched; rule_drift_detected→knowledge_drift_detected; DELETE rule_baseline_accepted, baseline_synced, legacy_client_path_present; KEEP claude_skill_path_migrated, claude_hook_path_migrated, codex_skill_path_migrated, mcp_config_migrated, meta_reconciled_on_startup, meta_reconciled, reapply_completed, event_ledger_truncated, mcp_event, edit_intent_checked, init_scan_completed. Net: 19 → 13 event types (4 renames + 3 deletions + 12 unchanged). (3) **Write `docs/schema.md`**: 1-page contract document covering frontmatter (7 fields), 13 event types, stable_id `K[PT]-(D|P|G|M|PR)-NNNN`, counters envelope. NOT marketing/README rewrite (rc.4 scope).

files.change: Add `tags: z.array(z.string()).default([])` field to the entry frontmatter schema; document that init-scan auto-fills from forensic tech-stack keywords; flat flow-style YAML array (parser already supports)

Rename 4 event types: rule_context_planned→knowledge_context_planned, rule_selection→knowledge_selection, rule_sections_fetched→knowledge_sections_fetched, rule_drift_detected→knowledge_drift_detected. DELETE 3 event types: rule_baseline_accepted, baseline_synced, legacy_client_path_present. KEEP 12 event types unchanged (claude_skill_path_migrated, claude_hook_path_migrated, codex_skill_path_migrated, mcp_config_migrated, meta_reconciled_on_startup, meta_reconciled, reapply_completed, event_ledger_truncated, mcp_event, edit_intent_checked, init_scan_completed; plus 4 renamed = 13 total). Update z.discriminatedUnion variants accordingly. Net: 19→13.
When emitting baseline knowledge entries during init-scan, populate tags field from forensic tech-stack keywords (e.g. ['typescript', 'react', 'vite'] from forensic.json languages + frameworks)
Update all event-ledger emit call sites to use new event-type names (knowledge_*); remove emit calls for the 3 deleted event types

1-page contract doc: (a) frontmatter — 7 fields (id, type, maturity, layer, title, tags, summary); (b) 13 event types — name + payload shape; (c) stable_id format `K[PT]-(D|P|G|M|PR)-NNNN` decomposition; (d) counters envelope (agents.meta.json.counters monotonic structure). Strictly contract — no marketing copy.
Update fixtures to use renamed event types (knowledge_*); remove fixtures for the 3 deleted event types; add fixture exercising tags field roundtrip

implementation: Run `grep -n 'rule_context_planned\|rule_selection\|rule_sections_fetched\|rule_drift_detected\|rule_baseline_accepted\|baseline_synced\|legacy_client_path_present' packages/` to enumerate all call sites
In packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts: add tags field to frontmatter Zod schema with default []; document inline as flat flow-style YAML array

In packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts: locate the discriminated-union event schema; rename 4 variants (search-replace rule_X→knowledge_X); delete 3 variants entirely; update union literal list

In packages/cli/src/scanner/init-scan.ts: identify entry-emission code path; add a small helper that derives tags from forensic.json languages+frameworks (top 3-5 keywords); inject into emitted entries
In packages/server/src/services/event-emitter.ts and any other emit-call sites (grep): update event-type string literals to match renamed schema; delete emit calls for deleted event types
Write docs/schema.md (~1 page): structure as 4 sections (Frontmatter / Event Types / stable_id / Counters), each with a small table or code block; no narrative — pure contract
Update schemas-roundtrip.test.ts: rename event-type fixtures, remove deleted-type fixtures, add tags roundtrip fixture
Run `pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint` across packages — must exit 0

reference.pattern: Last-cheap-window schema migration with single discriminator-union refactor
reference.examples: Zod discriminatedUnion variant rename pattern; flat flow-style YAML array in frontmatter (existing parser support)

criteria: File `docs/schema.md` exists and contains: 'frontmatter', 'event', 'stable_id', 'counters' (4 grep hits)
init-scan emits at least 1 baseline entry with non-empty tags array (verified by integration test or dogfood)
Event-type count in event-ledger.ts is exactly 13 (4 renamed + 12 unchanged - 3 deleted from 19 = 13)

scope_boundary: OUT OF SCOPE: new event types `knowledge.{proposed,promoted,layer_changed,demoted,archived,archive_attempted}` (rc.2/3/4 will add as z.literal() variants — NOT this task), additional frontmatter fields (last_review_at/source_session/confidence_score/review_count/parent_id rejected per Q6), README/marketing copy (rc.4), 6 new doctor lint checks (rc.4). Strictly: 1 new frontmatter field + 4 renames + 3 deletes + docs/schema.md.

rationale.chosen_approach: Last-cheap-window schema migration: 1 frontmatter add + 4 renames + 3 deletes + 1 contract doc, single atomic commit
alternatives_considered: Add all rc.2/3/4 forward-compat fields now (last_review_at, confidence_score, etc.)
decision_factors: Window cost: rc.1 baseline doesn't exist yet → no fixture migration cost; after rc.2 dogfood emits real entries, rename gets expensive
events.jsonl as single source of truth avoids double-write consistency bugs (rejected fields)
rc.3 review skill needs tags field for filter search — must land before dogfood populates baseline
rationale.tradeoffs: schemas-roundtrip.test.ts gets touched twice (once in TASK-004 fixture cleanup, once here for rename) — accepted because TASK-006 lands AFTER TASK-004, so TASK-004 only needs to handle deletions, TASK-006 handles renames. NOT adding parent_id/source_session means rc.3 review skill must derive lineage from events.jsonl (more complex query, but consistent)

manual_checks: Eyeball docs/schema.md — is it ≤1 page, pure contract, no marketing tone?
Run `pnpm build` — confirm Zod schema rebuild produces no type errors
Run init-scan dry-run on a tmp project — confirm emitted entries include tags array
Run `pnpm test` — confirm schemas-roundtrip.test.ts passes with renamed/deleted event types
success_metrics: tags field present in agents-meta schema
init-scan integration test confirms tag auto-fill from forensic
unit: fabric-meta schema with tags field roundtrip
event-ledger schema with renamed types parsing
integration: Renamed events emit and parse correctly end-to-end

risks.description: Discriminated-union rename breaks downstream type narrowing across packages
risks.mitigation: Run `pnpm tsc --noEmit` across all packages BEFORE committing; chase every type error to its consumer
risks.fallback: If too many narrowing breakages, do rename in 2 sub-commits: (a) shared schema rename + (b) consumer migration

risks.description: Tags auto-fill from forensic.json may produce noisy/low-quality keywords on small repos
risks.mitigation: Cap to top 3-5 keywords; filter out generic terms (e.g. 'javascript' if 'typescript' already present); rc.3 review skill can refine via human edit
risks.fallback: Default tags=[] if forensic produces nothing meaningful — review skill still works (filter just shows all)

risks.description: docs/schema.md may diverge from code reality if schema evolves in rc.2/3/4
risks.mitigation: Add a schema.md update note to each of rc.2/3/4 task lists; consider auto-generating schema.md from Zod in rc.4
risks.fallback: If divergence found, treat as a rc.x.fix.N hotfix or update inline during the relevant rc

interfaces.name: FrontmatterSchema (extended)
interfaces.definition: z.object({ id, type, maturity, layer, title, summary, tags: z.array(z.string()).default([]) })
interfaces.purpose: v2 frontmatter contract with 7 fields; tags field added in rc.2 prep

key_functions.purpose: Map forensic.json languages+frameworks to top 3-5 tag keywords
